Choose based on your interest! 🚀"},{keys:['jee advanced','jee adv','crack jee'],reply:"**How to Crack JEE Advanced 🎯** **Subject-wise Strategy:** 📐 **Math** (easiest to score): • Focus: Calculus, Algebra, Coordinate Geometry, Permutation • Books: RD Sharma + Arihant Problems • Daily: 10 problems minimum ⚡ **Physics** (your strong subject): • Focus: Mechanics, Electrodynamics, Modern Physics • Books: HC Verma (must) + DC Pandey • Solve all HC Verma exercises ⚗️ **Chemistry**: • Organic: Named reactions chart banao • Physical: Numericals daily • Inorganic: NCERT line by line • Books: NCERT + JD Lee **Timeline:** • 5+ past year papers solve karo • Target 55–60% marks for IIT (General) • Last 2 months: Only revision + mock tests 💪 With 92% in 10th, 88% in 12th — you have strong base!"},{keys:['government','govt','psu','gate','sarkari'],reply:"**Government Jobs After Engineering 🏛️** **Via GATE (Best Route):** • ONGC — ₹12–18 LPA + perks • BHEL — ₹8–14 LPA • NTPC — ₹10–16 LPA • IOCL — ₹10–15 LPA • Power Grid — ₹8–12 LPA • GATE score valid 3 years **Direct Recruitment:** • ISRO Scientist — ₹7–12 LPA + research glory 🚀 • DRDO Scientist — ₹7–11 LPA • Defence (TGC) — ₹7–12 LPA + army officer • RRB JE — ₹4–8 LPA • SSC JE — ₹4–7 LPA **UPSC Engineering Services:** • Class-1 Central Govt Officer • Salary: ₹9–18 LPA + perks • Exam: Prelims → Mains → Interview **Best Strategy:** Prepare GATE in final year B.Tech. 🎯"},{keys:['mba','ms','masters','higher study','abroad'],reply:"**MBA vs MS After B.Tech — 2025 🎓** **MS (Master of Science):** • Best for: Deep tech, research, USA/Europe jobs • Top destinations: USA, Germany (free!), Canada • Cost: $40–80k (USA) | Free (Germany/TU Munich) • After MS salary: $100k–150k in USA • Good for: AI/ML, Robotics, VLSI, CS • Requirements: GRE 320+ | GPA 8+ **MBA:** • Best for: Management, consulting, startups • Top Indian: IIM A/B/C — ₹25–35 LPA avg • Foreign: ISB, XLRI — ₹20–30 LPA • Requires: 2–4 yrs work experience ideally • CAT exam for IIMs **🎯 My Recommendation:** • Love tech deeply? → **MS** (especially Germany = free!) • Want leadership/business? → **Work 2 yrs → MBA** • Want USA job? → **MS from state university** (better ROI) With your PCM background — **MS in CS/AI from Germany is FREE and excellent value!** 🇩🇪"},{keys:['college','arya','private','fees','rajasthan','jaipur'],reply:"**Private Engineering Colleges Guide 🏛️** **Rajasthan Top Colleges:** • BITS Pilani — ₹5.2L/yr | Best private in India | BITSAT 340+ • Manipal Jaipur — ₹3L/yr | Good placement • Arya College of Engineering, Jaipur — Affiliated to RTU • JECRC Jaipur — Popular local college • Poornima Group — Good for CSE **Arya College of Engineering, Jaipur:** • Affiliated: Rajasthan Technical University (RTU) • Courses: B.Tech CSE, ECE, ME, CE etc. • Fees: ~₹80k–1.2L/yr (approx) • Placement: Local Jaipur companies + some IT firms • Suitable for: If JEE score doesn't get NIT/DTU **Better Alternatives (similar fees):** • MNIT Jaipur (NIT) — Much better!
